title: The breakdown of social order in Baghdad, and the movement there of the volunteers and vigilantes under Khalid al-Daryush and Sahl b. Salama al-Ansiri
description: The breakdown of social order in Baghdad, and the movement there of the volunteers and vigilantes under Khalid al-Daryush and Sahl b. Salama al-Ansiri. Recorded under the year 201 AH (c. 817 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
